action: Removed tape on fan drain hole

problem: Oil drain valve not safety wired
action: Safety wired oil drain valve

problem: Left fuel tank drain is leaking.
action: Replaced left fuel tank drain valve. Leak checked good.

problem: #4 cyl drain elbow loose in cylinder
action: Tightened #4 cyl drain elbow.

problem: Pitot static drain cover broken
action: Installed new pitot static drain cover.

problem: Oil drain valve sticking
action: Removed and replaced oil drain valve

problem: #1 and 3 cyl rocker drain line hose clamps loose
action: Tightened #1 and 3 cyl rocker drain line hose clamps

problem: Oil quick drain worn
action: Installed oil quick drain to engine and safetied.

problem: Pitot static drain cover is broken.
action: Installed new pitot static drain cover.

problem: LH and RH engines need oil drain valves installed
action: Removed oil drain valves from LH and RH engines and replaced with quick drain valves. Ops and leak check good.

problem: Pitot static system drain cover cracked
action: Installed new pitot static drain cover.

problem: L/H sniffle drain valve damaged
action: Installed new sniffle drain valve and drain hose to L/H engine.

problem: Fuel Quantity System Check
action: Assisted. Removed LH and RH wing drain plugs to drain fuel. Reinstalled and safetied drain plugs. Leak and ops check good.

problem: Applied tape to static drain
action: Removed tape on static drain

problem: fuel line clamp broke
action: Installed new clamp on drain line. Stored extra under CFI seat.
